narrative:
Beavercreek 034 (precinct in Greene County) has 831 registered voters, with 50.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.8 percentage points.
